Spring Data Core
  1. org.springframework.data.spel

Uses of Package
org.springframework.data.spel

Packages that use org.springframework.data.spel
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.expression
Value Expression implementation.
org.springframework.data.mapping.model
Core implementation of the mapping subsystem's model.
org.springframework.data.repository.cdi
Base classes to implement CDI support for repositories.
org.springframework.data.repository.core.support
Base classes to implement repositories for various data stores.
org.springframework.data.repository.query
Support classes to work with query methods.
org.springframework.data.spel
SpEL support.
  • Classes in org.springframework.data.spel used by org.springframework.data.expression
    Class
    Description
    ExpressionDependencies
    Value object capturing dependencies to a method or property/field that is referenced from a SpEL expression.
  • Classes in org.springframework.data.spel used by org.springframework.data.mapping.model
    Class
    Description
    EvaluationContextProvider
    Provides a way to access a centrally defined potentially shared StandardEvaluationContext.
    ExpressionDependencies
    Value object capturing dependencies to a method or property/field that is referenced from a SpEL expression.

    Class
    Description
    EvaluationContextProvider
    Provides a way to access a centrally defined potentially shared StandardEvaluationContext.

    EvaluationContextProvider
    Provides a way to access a centrally defined potentially shared StandardEvaluationContext.

    EvaluationContextProvider
    Provides a way to access a centrally defined potentially shared StandardEvaluationContext.
  • Classes in org.springframework.data.spel used by org.springframework.data.spel
    Class
    Description
    EvaluationContextProvider
    Provides a way to access a centrally defined potentially shared StandardEvaluationContext.
    ExpressionDependencies
    Value object capturing dependencies to a method or property/field that is referenced from a SpEL expression.
    ExpressionDependencies.ExpressionDependency
    Value object to describe a dependency to a method or property/field that is referenced from a SpEL expression.
    ReactiveEvaluationContextProvider
    Provides a way to access a centrally defined potentially shared EvaluationContext.
